brief_notes: Excellent structured writing with narrative flow between sections. All key numbers verified: CRC02 F1 0->1.0, CRC22 0.5->0.9, CRC03 0.55->0.99, 14/17 (~82%) LOH, CRC15 6% purity, 88% CRC02 purity. Good balance of qualitative and quantitative comparisons. Figures appropriately placed (workflow, TME rescue, 2-pass, LOH breakdown). Discussion strong with concrete recommendations.
